## Checklist

- [ ] Feature branch created from `main` (never committed directly to `main`)
- [ ] Dead code removed from touched files (unused imports, variables, methods, classes, views, stale conditionals)
- [ ] All tests pass (`php artisan test --compact`)
- [ ] Code formatted with Pint (`vendor/bin/pint --dirty --format agent`)
- [ ] No `env()` calls outside of config files
- [ ] Eager loading used where applicable (no N+1 queries)
- [ ] Form Request used for any new/updated validation
- [ ] PR title and description are clear and informative
